title: RevertRaidChanges-Pro
description:
Restored Raid to the logic before version 1.21.
Allows most professional Raid Farms to function.
body:
## Description
### Restored the Raid logic to the state before version 1.21. 
- **Removed the 30-second cooldown for Raid.**
- **This does not include the restoration of the Bad Omen acquisition mechanism.**
- **Allows most professional Raid Farms to function.**

When used with [RevertRaidChanges-Extra-BadOmen](https://modrinth.com/datapack/revertraidchanges-extra-badomen) to restore the Bad Omen acquisition mechanism, it allows most non-professional Raid Farms to function.

## Modify Config

If you want to run the 20gt RaidFarm at full efficiency, you can modify the following file:
```
data\raid_change\function\raid_omen_reset.mcfunction
```
Change the duration:9 in the command below to duration:13.
```
summon minecraft:area_effect_cloud ~ ~1 ~ {Age:4,Duration:6,DurationOnUse:0,Radius:0.5,RadiusOnUse:0,RadiusPerTick:0,ReapplicationDelay:0,potion_contents:{custom_effects:[{amplifier:0,duration:9,id:"minecraft:raid_omen"}]}}
```
duration:9 is compatible with 10~20gt RaidFarms but may reduce efficiency. If you want your RaidFarm to run at full efficiency, you can try modifying it to other values.

Since this is a DataPack implementation of the Raid restoration, it is not possible to make all RaidFarms run at full efficiency.

For a lower performance overhead and fewer bugs version, refer to [RevertRaidChanges-Normal](https://modrinth.com/datapack/revertraidchanges-normal).
